assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-8: Contains '## Repository Registry' heading with a table. Row 1: 'trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend'. Row 2: 'trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 10-16: Contains '## Jira Configuration' heading followed by all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 18-20: Contains '## Code Intelligence' heading followed by 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' Also includes a concrete example: 'mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol(...)' on lines 25-29.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31: Contains '### Limitations' as a subheading under the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 18). Content: 'No limitations known — no Serena instances reported issues.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 9-14 (Step 2 — Discover Serena Instances): States 'Scanned tool names for the `mcp__<instance>__<tool>` naming pattern associated with Serena servers.' Lists '1. **serena_backend** — identified from tools: mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol, ...' and '2. **serena_ui** — identified from tools: mcp__serena_ui__find_symbol, ...'. Source is explicitly listed as 'mcp-tools-with-serena.md (MCP tool listing)'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 5-6 state 'All configuration sections were created new. No existing content was modified or removed.' However, lines 39-43 contain a '## Preserved' section that lists preserved existing CLAUDE.md content: '# my-project heading and description', '## Documentation section', '## Getting Started section'. The assertion says 'no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup', but the changes-log explicitly documents preserved entries. While the *configuration* sections are all new, the log does show preserved non-configuration content, contradicting a pure greenfield interpretation.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 5-6: Table header is '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' with separator '|---|---|---|---|'. These four columns exactly match the expected structure.
